mapper.insert: insert into Vote(activity_id, activity_voter_id, activity_candidate_id, result, round_no, created_at) values(#{activityId}, #{activityVoterId}, #{activityCandidateId}, #{result}, #{roundNo}, sysdate())

insert into Vote(activity_id, activity_voter_id, activity_candidate_id, result, round_no, created_at) values
(#{item.activityId}, #{item.activityVoterId}, #{item.activityCandidateId}, #{item.result}, #{item.roundNo}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select activity_candidate_id, result, count(1) as vote_count from Vote where activity_id = #{activityId} and round_no = 1 group by activity_candidate_id, result
